summary:
Step 11 'Expected the AI-Powered Detection toggle to be visible in the settings form.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The AI-Powered Detection toggle could not be turned off — clicking it had no visible effect and the UI remained in the ON state after multiple valid attempts.

Observations:
- The Settings page displays the "AI-Powered Detection" toggle in the ON position (blue) in the visible UI.
- Multiple interactions were attempted (clicking the toggle button repeatedly, clicking the inner icon, and clicking "Save Settings") but the toggle's visual state did not change.
- The Trust Score Threshold slider is present and set to 60, confirming the Settings page is reachable and some controls are functioning.
